informationReferenceName: EU Cyber Resilience Act (selected articles) (Articles 13-24) — Concept Crosswalk to AppSec Core V1
targetAudience: Application security engineers, security architects, and AppSec Core ontology users seeking concept-level alignment between this Focal Document and the AppSec Core V1 reference taxonomy. Mappings are derived computationally via claim-centric SBERT-based pipeline; SME refinement is future work.
referenceDocumentAuthor: SbD-ToE Programme — AppSec Core ontology project
comments: OLIR submission generated from substrate v7 (Cycle A frozen 2026-05-08; SUPPLIER SHA-256 596783ed984d9c0e8c8ef6439a0eaee8fbaf2d863af37138cde8fad55d62be04) via deterministic Python pipeline. Threshold-based continuous→categorical translation: cosine similarity ≥ 0.6 → relationship 'equal to'; 0.4 ≤ sim < 0.6 → 'intersects with'. Multi-claim per source-item: one row per (focalElement, referenceElement) unique pair using highest-similarity claim. subset of / superset of / not related to NOT used in first cut (cosine similarity is undirected; SME refinement future work). Programme DOI: 10.17605/OSF.IO/7T849.
pointOfContact: Pedro Farinha (programme lead) — SbD-ToE Programme; OSF 10.17605/OSF.IO/7T849
citations: Programme DOI: 10.17605/OSF.IO/7T849. Cycle A frozen tag: cycle-a-frozen-2026-05-08. Source pilot: EU Cyber Resilience Act (selected articles) (Articles 13-24); author European Union; URL https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32024R2847. Reference: AppSec Core V1 (V1.next (substrate v7 baseline; cycle-a-frozen-2026-05-08)).
